channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: nautechsystems /nautilus_trader | Rust | N/A
item.description: A high-performance algorithmic trading platform and event-driven backtester

item.title: moeru-ai /airi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: agentscope-ai /agentscope | Python | N/A
item.description: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

item.title: ItzCrazyKns /Perplexica | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Perplexica is an AI-powered answering engine.

item.title: FujiwaraChoki /MoneyPrinterV2 | Python | N/A
item.description: Automate the process of making money online.

item.title: alibaba /OpenSandbox | Python | N/A
item.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

item.title: agentscope-ai /ReMe | Python | N/A
item.description: ReMe: Memory Management Kit for Agents - Remember Me, Refine Me.

item.title: K-Dense-AI /claude-scientific-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

item.title: aquasecurity /trivy | Go | N/A
item.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | N/A | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: KeygraphHQ /shannon | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Shannon Lite is a fully autonomous AI pentester for web apps and APIs. 96.15% (100/104 exploits) on a hint-free, source-aware variant of the XBOW benchmark.
